_schemaDescription: Risk Assessment – Heat Map sample payload. Entity-level view for 'DMI Finance': 4 layers total, all scored. Color zones: Red/High Risk (2 layers), Yellow/Medium Risk (1 layer), Green/Low Risk (1 layer). No unscored layers. Color names and classification labels are client-configured — not hardcoded.

_drillDownExamples.universe: All entities in audit universe → viewContext.currentLevel = 'universe', itemType = 'entity'
_drillDownExamples.entity: This payload (layers within 'DMI Finance') → viewContext.currentLevel = 'entity', itemType = 'layer', contextPath = 'DMI Finance'
_drillDownExamples.layer: If user clicks 'Operations Layer' → viewContext.currentLevel = 'layer', itemType = 'process', contextPath = 'DMI Finance > Operations Layer'
_drillDownExamples.process: If user clicks 'Inventory Management' → viewContext.currentLevel = 'process', itemType = 'risk', contextPath = 'DMI Finance > Operations Layer > Inventory Management'

colorDistribution.description: 4 scored layers: 2 Red (High Risk), 1 Yellow (Medium Risk), 1 Green (Low Risk).

priorityItems.description: Top 3 layers by residual score requiring immediate audit attention within DMI Finance.
